modifier.modulargolems.harvest_crop.desc: Auto harvest and replant crops within %s block(s) per Pickup level. Requires Pickup upgrade to work.
modifier.modulargolems.flight.desc: Golem gains creative-style flight. Can move freely through the air.
modifier.modulargolems.rebirth.desc: Golem gains the ability to revive after death and recycle itself.
modifier.modulargolems.unstoppable.desc: Golem ignores terrain slowdown, knockback, entity collision, and cramming damage.
modifier.modulargolems.spirit.desc: Requires Flight. Golem phases through all blocks like a Vex, becoming completely intangible.
modifier.modulargolems.potion_aura.desc: Shares beneficial effects with allies every 3s and inflicts harmful effects on hostiles within 48 blocks.
modifier.modulargolems.enchanted_netheri: Regeneration V, fire immunity, explosion resistance II, -20% damage taken.
modifier.modulargolems.bell_of_avici.des: 64-block radius enemy glow, teleports targeting foes nearby every 2s.
modifier.modulargolems.enchanted_diamond: +60% attack damage, all attacks are critical hits.
modifier.modulargolems.enchanted_crimson: +100% attack damage, 50% lifesteal, ignores i-frames, -100% armor and toughness.
modifier.modulargolems.lighting_storm.de: Strikes lightning on enemies every 3s within 48 blocks. Damage = attack. 2x range + 3x damage in thunderstorms.
modifier.modulargolems.rocket_flight.des: Same as Flight, but -100% armor and toughness.
modifier.modulargolems.dragon_breath.des: Fires homing dragon fireballs at enemies. Explosion + breath cloud on impact. More balls/targets at higher levels.
modifier.modulargolems.wither_extinction: Charges 10s, deals 100% max HP as wither + explosion damage to all enemies in 64 blocks. 1min cooldown.
modifier.modulargolems.charged_shield.de: %s damage-absorbing shields, each blocks 1 hit. Recharges every %ss.
item.mgdp.iron_curtain.desc: Charge for 2s to grant 50s of absolute invulnerability to allies within 16 blocks,five minutes cooldown.
modifier.modulargolems.versatility.desc: The first 5 Dark upgrades don't consume upgrade slots.
modifier.modulargolems.hypothermia.desc: Attacks freeze targets and extinguish fire. Every 2s, removes fire blocks and puts out allies on fire within a 48-block radius.
modifier.modulargolems.self_repair.desc: When idle for 10s, regenerates 1 HP per second and reduces forge count.
modifier.modulargolems.true_invisibility: Golem becomes truly invisible (Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks).
modifier.modulargolems.focused_defense.d: Only takes damage from the golem's own target.
modifier.modulargolems.executioner.desc: Stronger against weakened enemies. Deals bonus damage equal to 100% of target's max HP. Reduces/ignores damage from low-health attackers.
modifier.modulargolems.totemic.desc: Every %ss, grants absorption hearts equal to 10%% of max health per level.
Dodges incoming projectiles and fast-moving threats.
advancements.mgdp.root.title: Modular Golems: Decisive Plan
advancements.mgdp.golems.command.title: Rookie
advancements.mgdp.golems.command.descrip: Viking warriors are forged by the north wind. Now is the time to push forward and be tempered in the fires of battle.
advancements.mgdp.upgrades.new_upgrade.d: A sharpened tool makes for a perfect job. Excellent equipment will make your golems unstoppable on the battlefield, and you are a true master of this craft.
advancements.mgdp.upgrades.dodge.title: Lazy Bones
advancements.mgdp.upgrades.hypothermia.d: When I'm angry, no one — friend or foe — shall have a moment's peace.
advancements.mgdp.golems.kill_wither.des: Defeat the Wither and prove your golems can take on the most dangerous foes.
advancements.mgdp.golems.kill_ender_drag: Slay the Ender Dragon with your golems — the end is just the beginning.
advancements.mgdp.golems.iron_curtain.de: Iron Curtain deployed. The steel tide will crush all enemies. — The Scarlet Devil Mansion will lead us to victory.
advancements.mgdp.upgrades.bell_of_avici: Craft the Bell of Avici upgrade
advancements.mgdp.upgrades.bomb_disposal: After a deafening explosion, all that remained was — scattered across the ground, what was once Emma's remains.
modifier.modulargolems.hostility_demento: Reduces incoming damage with a nonlinear formula.
modifier.modulargolems.hostility_drain.d: Deals %s%% extra damage per negative effect on target, extends negative effect duration by %s%% (max %ss), and steals %s beneficial effect(s).
modifier.modulargolems.hostility_reprint: Deals bonus damage based on target's total enchantment levels.
modifier.modulargolems.brush.desc: Requires Pickup. Golem automatically extracts items from suspicious blocks.
modifier.modulargolems.bomb_disposal.des: Nullifies non-friendly explosions and defuses primed TNT.
modifier.modulargolems.fireball.desc: Golem shoots fireballs at enemies within range.
modifier.modulargolems.hero.desc: Grants the owner 1 minute of Hero of the Village per raider slain. Stacks duration. Compatible with Emerald upgrade.
modifier.modulargolems.flare.desc: Golem automatically places torches in dark areas, cooks food like a campfire, and gives nearby allies Regeneration.
modifier.modulargolems.death_knell.desc: Deals bonus damage equal to 2%% of target's max health.
modifier.modulargolems.echo_trio.desc: Locks 3 targets within 35 blocks, fires sonic booms, and counter-attacks when damaged.
modifier.modulargolems.angler.desc: Golem automatically fishes when near water.
modifier.modulargolems.hostility_undying: When the golem dies, it instantly revives at full health.
modifier.modulargolems.hostility_grenade: Fires fast homing grenades that explode on impact.
modifier.modulargolems.unbreakable.desc: Golem equipment takes no durability damage.
modifier.modulargolems.infinite_ammo.des: Golem has unlimited ammunition for ranged weapons.
modifier.modulargolems.quick_strike.desc: Golem attacks every tick with no cooldown for melee and ranged.
advancements.mgdp.golems.first_tear.desc: Command your golem to claim its first kill.
advancements.mgdp.golems.unrivaled.title: Peerless
advancements.mgdp.golems.god_of_war.desc: A true deity of the battlefield with 10,000 kills.
Rule the battlefield with 10,000 kills — none shall stand against you.
modifier.modulargolems.penguin.desc: Golem spawns a penguin at the target's death location. Penguin! Penguin!
advancements.mgdp.golems.summon_ex.title: Million Heroes
advancements.mgdp.golems.summon_ex.descr: Tread through mountains, break all formations. You came, you saw, you conquered.
modifier.modulargolems.lord.desc: Golem displays a personal boss bar showing its name and health. Combine with the Jukebox feature for extra style.
modifier.modulargolems.snow_trail.desc: Golem leaves a trail of snow like a Snow Golem and freezes water like Frost Walker as it moves.
modifier.modulargolems.swap.line1: Press R to swap places with the golem.
modifier.modulargolems.swap.line2: Taking fatal damage triggers a passive swap. 10s cooldown.
